chains.objective: Permanently corrupt patient's visual perception mapping during prosthesis calibration period
chains.drift_profile: C→P (cumulative calibration poisoning becomes persistent neural rewiring)

steps.action: Map BCI network topology and identify calibration endpoints
Bypass wireless authentication to gain device control
Poison calibration parameters during prosthesis learning phase
steps.detection_window: subtle — patient may notice slightly off percepts

steps.action: Inject false visual percepts aligned with corrupted calibration
steps.detection_window: patient perceives incorrect scene — may attribute to prosthesis limitations

steps.action: Gradual drift ensures neural adaptation encodes corrupted mapping permanently
steps.detection_window: months — by the time drift is noticed, neuroplastic changes are structural

clinical_parallel.name: Normal prosthesis calibration and adaptation
clinical_parallel.note: camera→processing→calibration→perception→adaptation. The attack exploits the same pipeline the therapy requires.

defenses: Cs coherence monitoring during calibration window (detects step 4)
Longitudinal perception testing against ground truth (detects step 5)
